issues.description: First effect missing target specification. Text says 'Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters' but DSL has generic ChooseOpponentCharacter. Should clarify: is this 1 specific character (ChooseOpponentCharacter with count:1) or all opponent characters (AllOpponentCharacters)? Based on 'up to 1', should be count:1.

Second [When Attacking] effect is incomplete. Text states 'up to 1 of your {Navy} type Leader can also attack active Characters during this turn' but this secondary effect is entirely missing from DSL. This is a second action that needs to be added.
First action targets Self correctly, but the second action (Navy leader attacking) needs to be a separate action in the same effect with proper targeting and mechanics.
